data.title: McKesson Secures New $5 Billion Revolving Credit Facility
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

McKesson ( (MCK) ) has provided an update.

On April 24, 2026, McKesson entered into a new $5.0 billion senior unsecured revolving credit facility maturing in April 2031, replacing its prior $1.0 billion 364-day facility and $4.0 billion five-year facility, both of which had no outstanding borrowings at termination. The new agreement expands multicurrency borrowing capacity to a $4.5 billion sublimit, maintains largely similar terms to the prior structure, and introduces a total debt-to-Consolidated EBITDA covenant capped at 4.25x, with a temporary step-up to 4.75x after sizable cash acquisitions, excluding debt and EBITDA from its Medical-Surgical Solutions segment, thereby enhancing McKesson’s long-term liquidity and financial flexibility for future strategic activity.

The most recent analyst rating on (MCK) stock is a Buy with a $828.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on McKesson stock, see the MCK Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on MCK Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, MCK is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by strong cash generation and solid operating performance, reinforced by a constructive earnings call with raised FY2026 guidance and continued capital returns. Offsetting these positives are balance-sheet leverage/volatility and weaker near-term technical momentum, with valuation appearing only average given the P/E and very low dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on MCK stock, click here.

More about McKesson

McKesson Corporation is a global healthcare services and distribution company that supplies pharmaceuticals, medical-surgical products and related solutions to providers, pharmacies and health systems. The company operates across multiple geographies and currencies, requiring large, flexible credit facilities to support its working capital, acquisitions and broader capital management strategy.

Average Trading Volume: 808,325

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $101.4B

On April 28, 2026, LGI Homes reported first-quarter 2026 results, delivering 916 homes, including 881 home closings that generated $319.7 million in home sales revenue. The company achieved an average sales price of about $362,924, an adjusted gross margin of 23.4% and net income of $2.2 million, while ending the quarter with 1,699 homes in backlog, up 63.4% year over year.

Management highlighted strong execution, disciplined pricing and cost control as key drivers of margins that exceeded prior guidance, prompting an increase to full-year 2026 gross margin and adjusted gross margin targets. data.title: IAC Restructures, Rebrands as People Incorporated Platform
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

IAC/InteractiveCorp. ( (IAC) ) has provided an announcement.

IAC said it will change its corporate name to People Incorporated around its second-quarter 2026 earnings in August and is launching a restructuring plan to fold remaining IAC corporate functions into the People Inc. publishing business. The plan, which includes workforce reductions, technology integration and other cost measures, is expected to be completed by the first quarter of 2027, generating about $40 million in annual run-rate savings at a total estimated cost of roughly $63 million, largely from severance and non-cash stock-based compensation.

As part of the consolidation, long-time executives Christopher Halpin and Kendall Handler will exit their roles following the filing of the June 30, 2026 Form 10-Q, with People CEO Neil Vogel and People CFO Tim Quinn slated to assume the chief executive and chief financial officer posts at the parent company. The transition agreements signed on April 27, 2026 provide the departing executives with salary continuation, a potential 2026 bonus, accelerated equity vesting and consulting roles through the 2026 Form 10-K, underscoring a broader strategic pivot to a leaner structure focused on the People publishing platform and the company’s enlarged 26% stake in MGM Resorts.

The most recent analyst rating on (IAC) stock is a Buy with a $48.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on IAC/InteractiveCorp. stock, see the IAC Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on IAC Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, IAC is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial performance (declining revenue, ongoing losses, and uneven cash generation). It is partially supported by neutral-to-mildly positive technicals and a reasonably managed balance sheet, plus a moderately constructive earnings outlook driven by People’s digital momentum and ongoing buybacks—tempered by traffic declines from Google, litigation costs, and cautious 2026 guidance.

To see Spark’s full report on IAC stock, click here.

More about IAC/InteractiveCorp.

IAC/InterActiveCorp., soon to be renamed People Incorporated, is a New York-based holding company focused primarily on its People Inc. digital and print publishing operations, alongside strategic equity stakes in MGM Resorts International and Turo Inc. The group has evolved from a diversified internet and media conglomerate into a publisher-led business with more than 40 brands and a significant presence across online, social and print channels.

The company’s publishing arm, built around the PEOPLE brand and legacy Meredith and Time Inc. titles, has delivered ten consecutive quarters of digital revenue growth and maintains strong EBITDA margins. It leverages proprietary ad technology such as its D/Cipher AI targeting product and a diversified audience strategy that reduces reliance on search engines, while continuing to ship roughly 250 million magazines annually across six remaining print books.

Average Trading Volume: 1,161,355

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $3.33B

For an in-depth examination of IAC stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

data.title: Purple Innovation Names New CFO Amid Strategic Shift
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Purple Innovation ( (PRPL) ) just unveiled an update.

Purple Innovation reported first-quarter 2026 results on April 28, 2026, with net revenue of $95.7 million, down 8.1% year over year as ecommerce and wholesale softened, partly offset by showroom growth and a 7.0% increase in showroom comparable sales. Gross margin declined to 36.8% due to investment in Royale floor models and lower production leverage, operating expenses fell 6.3% on cost savings, adjusted EBITDA remained at a loss of $4.8 million, net loss widened to $30.5 million, cash was steady at $25 million, inventories edged down, and full-year 2026 revenue guidance was reduced to $465–$485 million while EBITDA guidance was reaffirmed.

In executive changes, Chief Financial Officer Todd Vogensen notified the company of his resignation effective May 1, 2026, with the company stating his departure was not due to any disagreement over financial reporting or accounting. On April 24, 2026, the board appointed industry veteran Robert G. Lucian as CFO effective the week of April 27, 2026, offering a $600,000 base salary plus incentives, a move that brings deep finance experience from La-Z-Boy, Coty and Procter & Gamble as Purple seeks to strengthen its financial leadership amid a strategic focus on premium products and wholesale expansion.

The most recent analyst rating on (PRPL) stock is a Hold with a $0.85 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Purple Innovation stock, see the PRPL Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on PRPL Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, PRPL is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial fundamentals (negative equity, ongoing losses, and cash burn) and a still-bearish technical trend. This is partially offset by a more positive earnings outlook, with management guiding to materially higher 2026 adjusted EBITDA and positive free cash flow, alongside gross margin remaining above 40%.

To see Spark’s full report on PRPL stock, click here.

More about Purple Innovation

Purple Innovation, Inc. is a U.S.-based comfort innovation company focused on sleep products, best known for its GelFlex Grid technology used in mattresses designed to reduce pain and improve sleep quality. The company extends this proprietary comfort technology into pillows, bedding and cushions, targeting consumers seeking premium, technology-driven solutions for better rest and everyday comfort.

Following its merger-driven expansion, California BanCorp reported net income of $13.8 million, or $0.42 per diluted share, for the first quarter of 2026, down from both the fourth quarter of 2025 and the prior-year period. Management highlighted merger benefits including a stronger balance sheet and broader market reach, as the quarter showed a slightly higher net interest margin of 4.47%, lower funding costs, continued strong capital ratios, but higher nonperforming assets and reduced reversals of credit loss provisions.

data.title: Roadzen’s VehicleCare Wins Major Indian Insurer Claims Contract
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Roadzen Inc ( (RDZN) ) is now available.

On April 27, 2026, Roadzen’s India-based subsidiary VehicleCare, which operates the AutoSpace workshop management software, was chosen under contract by one of India’s largest general insurers to handle auto insurance claims across its nationwide repair network. VehicleCare’s platform links more than 1,200 verified workshops in metro, Tier-1, and Tier-2 cities, digitizing the entire repair journey and serving insurers, fleet operators, and individual vehicle owners.

The mandate makes VehicleCare a preferred repair partner for motor claims, offering cashless repairs with guaranteed turnaround times and full digital visibility for the insurer into repair status, approvals, and cost controls. The engagement is expected to generate over $10 million in annual revenue as volumes scale from an approximately $800 million motor claims pool and strengthens VehicleCare’s role as a core part of India’s motor insurance repair infrastructure.

Roadzen views the contract as validation of its strategy to pair AI-led claims automation with a physical repair network, turning VehicleCare into an integrated claims infrastructure platform that spans intake, triage, workshop allocation, parts procurement, and completion tracking. The deal enhances Roadzen’s growth outlook in India and may support deeper partnerships as insurers increasingly digitize and outsource repair network management to technology-centric platforms delivering transparency, cost savings, and improved policyholder experience.

The most recent analyst rating on (RDZN) stock is a Buy with a $5.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Roadzen Inc stock, see the RDZN Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on RDZN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, RDZN is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial fundamentals—large ongoing losses, persistent cash burn, and negative equity. Technical signals are moderately supportive, and recent corporate updates are positive, but valuation support is limited due to unprofitability and no dividend data.

To see Spark’s full report on RDZN stock, click here.

More about Roadzen Inc

Roadzen Inc. is a Nasdaq-listed technology company specializing in artificial intelligence at the intersection of insurance and mobility, building platforms that help insurers, automakers, and fleet operators predict and prevent risk and automate claims processes. The California-headquartered firm serves thousands of clients across North America, Europe, and Asia with telematics, generative AI, and computer-vision driven products that enable embedded insurance, safer driving, and more efficient claims handling.

The company employs more than 300 people across offices in the U.S., U.K., and India, positioning it as a global provider of digital insurance infrastructure for leading insurers, carmakers, fleets, dealerships, and agents. Its technology underpins new insurance products, policy sales, claims processing, and road-safety initiatives, and has been recognized by major business publications for innovation in AI.

Lululemon Athletica ( (LULU) ) just unveiled an update.

On April 26, 2026, lululemon athletica’s board appointed veteran consumer and beauty executive Esi Eggleston Bracey as an independent director, effective April 28, 2026, expanding the board to 11 members until the 2026 annual meeting. Her three decades of experience at Unilever, Coty, and Procter & Gamble, along with other public board roles, underscores lululemon’s drive to refresh its board with global brand-building and consumer-marketing expertise.

Also on April 26, 2026, director Shane Grant notified the company that he will retire from the board and not stand for reelection at the 2026 annual meeting, following a similar decision by director David Mussafer previously disclosed in March. After the meeting, the board will be reduced to nine members, reflecting an ongoing rebalancing of governance as the company prepares for its next phase of growth under a refreshed board and incoming CEO Heidi O’Neill.

data.title: Rocket Pharmaceuticals Monetizes Voucher to Extend Cash Runway
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Rocket Pharmaceuticals ( (RCKT) ).

On April 26, 2026, Rocket Pharmaceuticals entered into a definitive agreement to sell a Rare Pediatric Disease Priority Review Voucher that it was awarded after the U.S. Food and Drug Administration granted accelerated approval to its gene therapy KRESLADI for severe leukocyte adhesion deficiency-I in pediatric patients. The buyer will pay $180 million in cash for the voucher, with closing subject to customary conditions including clearance under U.S. antitrust review rules.

Rocket said on April 28, 2026 that monetizing the voucher provides $180 million of non-dilutive capital, extending its cash runway into the second quarter of 2028 and reinforcing its strategy of prioritizing cardiovascular gene therapy programs. The proceeds are earmarked to advance clinical-stage candidates for Danon disease, PKP2-associated arrhythmogenic cardiomyopathy and BAG3-associated dilated cardiomyopathy, strengthening the company’s funding profile as competition intensifies in genetic therapies for rare cardiac disorders.

The most recent analyst rating on (RCKT) stock is a Buy with a $12.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Rocket Pharmaceuticals stock, see the RCKT Stock Forecast page.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (no revenue, persistent losses, and ongoing cash burn). Technicals are only mildly supportive, while valuation is constrained by negative earnings and no dividend. Offsetting these, the FDA accelerated approval and Priority Review Voucher are meaningful positives that improve the outlook and financial flexibility.

To see Spark’s full report on RCKT stock, click here.

More about Rocket Pharmaceuticals

Rocket Pharmaceuticals, Inc. is a fully integrated, commercial-stage biotechnology company focused on gene therapies for rare and devastating cardiovascular diseases, with additional programs in hematology and immunology. Its cardiovascular pipeline includes three clinical-stage programs targeting hypertrophic, arrhythmogenic and dilated inherited cardiomyopathies, addressing more than 100,000 patients in the U.S. and EU.

The company leverages proprietary AAV manufacturing capabilities and multi-year efficacy and safety data in cardiac gene therapy, and it has experience treating cardiac patients in late-stage AAV programs. Rocket is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker RCKT and operates out of Cranbury, New Jersey.

PMGC Holdings ( (ELAB) ) has issued an announcement.

On April 28, 2026, NorthStrive Biosciences filed a new U.S. patent application for its myostatin‑engineered probiotic EL-22, expanding the technology into human pharmaceutical applications targeting muscle loss. The application covers formulated drug products, specific dosing regimens and indications across a spectrum of muscle-wasting conditions, including sarcopenia, disuse atrophy, certain neurological disorders and muscle loss linked to GLP-1 weight-loss treatments.

The move broadens NorthStrive’s intellectual property around EL-22, its lead asset designed to support muscle preservation and growth, and underscores the company’s focus on muscle health therapeutics in both pharmaceutical and adjacent markets. By strengthening its IP portfolio, the PMGC subsidiary is seeking to reinforce its competitive position in muscle and metabolic health, which could have strategic implications for its value within PMGC’s diversified holdings and for stakeholders in emerging muscle-preservation therapies.

data.title: Watsco Posts Flat Q1 Results, Boosts Dividend, Pursues Acquisition
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Watsco ( (WSO) ) has provided an update.

On April 28, 2026, Watsco reported first-quarter 2026 results that showed flat revenue of $1.53 billion and gross profit of $428 million, with operating income down 2% and earnings per share down 3% to $1.87, reflecting lower unit volumes but higher average selling prices tied to the ongoing A2L refrigerant transition that began in early 2025. Cash used in operations improved sharply to $19 million from $178 million a year earlier as working capital needs eased, while U.S. markets grew 2% against an 11% international decline, and the company increased its annual cash dividend by 10% in April 2026 to $13.20 per share.

The company also agreed to acquire Jackson Supply Company, a leading Sunbelt HVAC distributor with annual sales of $230 million, in a deal expected to close in the second quarter of 2026 and add meaningful scale and diversification in core Sunbelt markets under Jackson’s existing leadership team. Watsco’s growing technology ecosystem continued to gain traction, with e-commerce sales up 16% to represent 36% of trailing 12‑month sales and its OnCallAir digital sales platform generating a 20% rise in gross merchandise value, reinforcing the company’s competitive edge and supporting its buy‑and‑build expansion strategy in a stabilizing but still seasonal HVAC market.

The most recent analyst rating on (WSO) stock is a Hold with a $370.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Watsco stock, see the WSO Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on WSO Stock

This is tempered by a relatively expensive valuation (P/E ~32.6) and earnings-call commentary pointing to ongoing near-term volume and sales softness despite margin improvement initiatives.

To see Spark’s full report on WSO stock, click here.

More about Watsco

Watsco, Inc. is the largest distributor in the highly fragmented North American heating, ventilation, air conditioning and refrigeration (HVAC/R) market, supplying residential and light-commercial equipment, parts and related products. The Miami-based company focuses on organic growth and acquisitions, supports about 74,000 contractors with advanced digital tools, and maintains a debt‑free balance sheet to fund technology and network expansion.

Since entering HVAC distribution in 1989, Watsco has completed more than 70 acquisitions and generated an 18% compounded annual total shareholder return, leveraging its scale and technology to consolidate a Sunbelt- and U.S.-centric customer base. It has invested over $250 million in e-commerce, mobile apps and digital sales platforms that drive higher customer engagement, efficiency and loyalty across its 650 locations.

data.title: Cardiol Therapeutics Expands U.S. Phase III MAVERIC Trial Network as Enrollment Reaches 75%
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Cardiol Therapeutics ( (TSE:CRDL) ) has provided an announcement.

On April 28, 2026, Cardiol Therapeutics announced it is expanding the U.S. clinical network for its pivotal Phase III MAVERIC trial of CardiolRx™ in recurrent pericarditis, reflecting strong investigator interest from leading cardiovascular centers such as Cleveland Clinic, Mayo Clinic, and Massachusetts General Hospital. Patient enrollment has reached 75%, with the company expecting to complete target recruitment by the end of the second quarter of 2026, potentially extending into the third quarter as up to seven additional U.S. sites are activated, positioning MAVERIC to generate the data needed to support a future U.S. regulatory filing and strengthen Cardiol’s standing in inflammatory heart disease therapeutics.

MAVERIC, a randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled study designed with U.S. FDA input, builds on positive Phase II MAvERIC data that showed rapid, sustained reductions in pericarditis pain, inflammation, and recurrence rates. By broadening its trial footprint across premier academic hospitals and leveraging prior clinical results, Cardiol aims to establish CardiolRx™ as a non-immunosuppressive oral option earlier in the treatment pathway for recurrent pericarditis, potentially addressing a significant unmet need in a U.S. population where recurrent pericarditis imposes substantial morbidity and healthcare costs.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:CRDL) stock is a Buy with a C$8.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Cardiol Therapeutics stock, see the TSE:CRDL Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on CRDL Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CRDL is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial performance (pre-revenue, sizable losses, and sustained cash burn), partially offset by a low-debt balance sheet. To see Spark’s full report on CRDL stock, click here.

More about Cardiol Therapeutics

Cardiol Therapeutics Inc. is a late-stage life sciences company focused on developing anti-inflammatory and anti-fibrotic therapies for heart disease. Its lead small-molecule candidate, CardiolRx™, targets inflammasome pathway activation in conditions such as recurrent pericarditis, myocarditis, and heart failure, and the company is also advancing CRD-38 for inflammatory heart disease, including heart failure.

data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

Exodus Movement, Inc. Class A ( (EXOD) ) has issued an update.

On April 28, 2026, Exodus Movement, Inc. announced it had exercised its rights as a secured lender under an English-law term loan facility to appoint receivers in the United Kingdom over Monavate Holdings Limited, Monavate Ltd and Baanx.com Ltd, subsidiaries of W3C Corp that had pledged their shares as collateral for a $70 million loan. The move followed Exodus’s April 13, 2026 declaration that the loans were payable on demand and an unmet April 27, 2026 repayment deadline, with the experienced AlixPartners-led receiver team now taking control of the shares and planning a sale process in which Exodus intends to bid, while the company emphasizes continuity for Monavate and Baanx customers and staff and frames the action as protecting its shareholders.

The receivership action reflects Exodus’s assertive response to W3C’s default and underscores the company’s willingness to enforce its secured creditor rights to safeguard its $70 million exposure. By positioning itself as a bidder in the forthcoming sale of Monavate and Baanx shares, Exodus may influence the future ownership and strategic direction of these UK-based fintech operations, with implications for its own capital recovery and potential expansion of its crypto and payments footprint.

The most recent analyst rating on (EXOD) stock is a Buy with a $20.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Exodus Movement, Inc. Class A stock, see the EXOD Stock Forecast page.

data.title: Avalo Therapeutics Restructures AlmataBio Milestone Payment Obligations
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Avalo Therapeutics ( (AVTX) ) has provided an announcement.

On April 26, 2026, Avalo Therapeutics entered into a Milestone Buyout Option and Amendment Agreement tied to its March 2024 acquisition of AlmataBio, Inc. The deal restructures a previously agreed $15 million contingent milestone payment that was to be triggered upon dosing the first patient in a Phase 3 trial.

Under the new arrangement, Avalo will pay $2.25 million to former AlmataBio securityholders within five business days of the effective date. It then has a 90-day option to pay an additional $5.125 million in cash, stock, or a mix, to fully settle the milestone, or otherwise remain liable for a $12.75 million payment when the Phase 3 dosing milestone is reached.

The modification, disclosed in an April 28, 2026 press release, gives Avalo greater flexibility in managing near- and medium-term cash outflows linked to its pipeline. The structure may reduce future milestone obligations if the company elects the buyout, potentially improving balance sheet visibility while preserving its strategic focus on advancing IL-1β-based therapies.

The most recent analyst rating on (AVTX) stock is a Buy with a $29.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Avalo Therapeutics stock, see the AVTX Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, AVTX is a Neutral.
